## What Changed

Describe the specific changes made in this PR.

## Why

Explain the motivation and context.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass, if relevant
- [ ] UI/manual flow checked, if relevant
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck`, or `build` run where applicable

## Security And Quality

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or real `.env` values committed
- [ ] No private archives or extracted private source committed
- [ ] Archive/file inputs validated where relevant
- [ ] Source redaction/filtering preserved where relevant
- [ ] Errors shown to users do not leak internals
- [ ] Logs do not expose sensitive data
- [ ] Diff reviewed for unrelated changes

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated, if behavior/setup/API/env changed
- [ ] `docs/STATE.md` updated, if project state changed
- [ ] No docs update needed

## Risks Or Follow-Ups

List known risks, limitations, rollout notes, or follow-up tasks.
